steps.title: Identify the goal signal
steps.content: The prompt’s key signal is the student’s goal to emphasize a difference between the two sculptures.

steps.title: Select the choice that highlights the difference
steps.content:
Choice B directly contrasts the sculptures by noting that Etchells’s work spells out a phrase while Le’s is an abstract squiggle shape, thus emphasizing a difference.
The other choices either note similarities, mention only shared traits, or fail to contrast the sculptures.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
